differential_diagnoses: Dabrafenib and trametinib-induced systemic inflammatory reaction (cytokine release-like syndrome)
Drug-induced liver injury (DILI) from dabrafenib and trametinib
Hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis (HLH) secondary to drug therapy or malignancy
Occult metastatic melanoma progression (biliary obstruction or parenchymal infiltration)
Atypical biliary pathology (e.g., acalculous cholecystitis or biliary sludge obstruction)
next_steps: Evaluate for HLH with ferritin, soluble IL-2 receptor, triglycerides, and fibrinogen
Obtain peripheral blood smear for morulae and send PCR for Anaplasma phagocytophilum
Perform MRCP to evaluate for subtle biliary tract disease or occult obstruction not seen on US/CT
Consider liver biopsy if liver enzymes continue to trend upward and systemic symptoms recur
